shortDescription.en: Audit and improve Shopify image alt text
shortDescription.zh: 审查并优化 Shopify 图片 alt text

longDescription.en: Scan Shopify product media, collection featured images, article featured images, and article inline images, then prepare a reviewable alt text optimization plan. The workflow first verifies that the active AI agent can truly inspect images, requires multimodal image understanding for candidates, enforces Shopify alt text length limits, checks for repeated or keyword-stuffed text, and applies only approved updates.
longDescription.zh: 扫描 Shopify 商品媒体、集合封面图、博客文章封面图和文章正文图片，并生成可审核的 alt text 优化计划。这个 workflow 会先验证当前 AI agent 能否真正识别图片；生成候选内容必须使用多模态图片理解，同时检查 Shopify alt text 字符限制、重复文案和关键词堆叠，并且只执行用户批准的更新。

introduction.en: Optimize Shopify image alt text with a preview-first workflow that requires real image understanding before generating or applying candidates.
introduction.zh: 用先预览再执行的流程优化 Shopify 图片 alt text：生成或写入候选内容前必须完成真实图片理解。

title.zh: 基于图片识别的 alt text

description.en: Verifies that the active AI model can inspect local images, then uses downloaded product, collection, and article images to generate grounded descriptions from pixel evidence.
description.zh: 先测试当前 AI 模型是否能识别本地图片；通过后再下载商品、集合和文章图片，基于真实画面生成更可靠的描述。

description.en: Counts every product, collection, and article image that needs optimization, flags shared files and article HTML edits, and proposes manageable batches before any update.
description.zh: 统计所有需要优化的商品、集合和文章图片，标记共享文件和文章 HTML 风险，并在更新前规划可控批次。

description.en: Enforces Shopify's 512-character hard limit, targets concise 125-character alt text, and rejects repeated or keyword-stuffed candidates.
description.zh: 强制遵守 Shopify 512 字符硬限制，默认控制在 125 字符以内，并拒绝重复或关键词堆叠的候选。

description.en: Updates product MediaImage alt text, collection image altText, article featured image altText, and inline article img alt attributes only after explicit approval.
description.zh: 只在明确批准后更新商品 MediaImage alt text、集合图片 altText、文章封面图 altText 和文章正文图片 alt 属性。

shortDescription.en: Grow product search visibility with AI-driven SERP optimization and polished HTML reports
shortDescription.zh: 用 AI 驱动的 SERP 优化与精致 HTML 报告，提升商品搜索可见度

longDescription.en: Turn your Shopify catalog into a scalable product SEO growth engine. This skill analyzes product-level SERP opportunities, product image Alt Text signals, and real buyer intent, then delivers polished HTML audits your team can review and execute fast. The methodology is refined with globally trusted SEO best-practice knowledge from Google documentation, Moz, Semrush, and Ahrefs, so your optimization decisions stay practical, modern, and conversion-oriented.
longDescription.zh: 把你的 Shopify 商品目录升级为可持续增长的搜索流量引擎。该技能会分析商品级 SERP 机会、商品图片 Alt Text 信号和真实买家搜索意图，并输出可直接评审与落地的精致 HTML 审计报告。方法论基于 Google 官方文档、Moz、Semrush、Ahrefs 等全球顶级 SEO 最佳实践打磨，让你的优化决策更贴近当下搜索生态，并更聚焦转化结果。

introduction.en: Convert unclear product SEO requests into a clear growth roadmap, premium HTML audits, and high-impact SERP improvements your team can launch with confidence.
introduction.zh: 把模糊的商品 SEO 需求转化为清晰的增长路线图、专业级 HTML 审计报告和高影响力 SERP 优化动作。

title.zh: 全球 SEO 最佳实践引擎

description.en: Built on practical guidance distilled from Google Search documentation, Moz, Semrush, and Ahrefs to help your product pages align with what modern search and shoppers reward.
description.zh: 基于 Google Search 官方文档、Moz、Semrush、Ahrefs 的实战方法提炼，帮助你的商品页更贴合现代搜索机制与用户决策路径。

description.en: Delivers polished, presentation-ready HTML audits that make opportunities, priorities, and recommended actions instantly clear to marketing, SEO, and merchandising teams.
description.zh: 输出可直接展示给市场、SEO 与商品团队的精致 HTML 审计报告，让机会点、优先级与推荐动作一眼清晰。

description.en: Transforms broad keywords into high-converting product intent angles across use cases, pain points, comparisons, and purchase stages to improve snippet relevance and click appeal.
description.zh: 把宽泛关键词拆解为更高转化的商品意图角度，覆盖场景、痛点、对比与购买阶段，提升摘要相关性与点击吸引力。

description.en: Uncovers product-led content and distribution opportunities so you can expand qualified search demand, support rankings over time, and create stronger acquisition flywheels.
description.zh: 挖掘商品驱动的内容与分发机会，帮助你持续扩大高质量搜索需求，支撑长期排名表现并强化自然获客飞轮。

description.en: Move from insights to execution quickly with a controlled rollout flow that keeps teams aligned and reduces rework across SEO, content, and ecommerce operations.
description.zh: 通过可控发布流程，把洞察快速转化为执行结果，同时提升 SEO、内容与电商运营协同效率并减少返工。

description.en: Audits product metafield definitions and values, detects missing high-impact fields such as material, specs, dimensions, reviews, and feature data, and prepares evidence-backed updates for richer snippets and cleaner product detail signals.
description.zh: 审计商品 metafield 的定义与实际值，识别材质、规格、尺寸、评价、特征等高影响字段的缺失与质量问题，并为更丰富的 snippets 与更清晰的商品详情信号准备基于证据的优化建议。

shortDescription.en: Audit and improve Shopify blog articles with preview-first SEO workflows
shortDescription.zh: 用先预览后执行的流程审计并优化 Shopify 博客文章

longDescription.en: Audit Shopify blog articles for readability, HTML quality, on-page SEO, accessibility, links, images, page experience, and evidence-backed E-E-A-T. Generate a reviewable audit and storefront-style preview, then update only after explicit approval.
longDescription.zh: 审计 Shopify 博客文章的可读性、HTML 质量、页面 SEO、无障碍、链接、图片、页面体验和有证据支持的 E-E-A-T。先生成可审核的报告与店铺样式预览，获得明确批准后才更新文章。

introduction.en: Turn a Shopify article into a clear SEO audit, storefront preview, and approval-based improvement plan.
introduction.zh: 把 Shopify 文章转化为清晰的 SEO 审计、店铺预览和需确认后执行的优化计划。

description.en: Reviews clarity, heading hierarchy, lists, clickable TOC, FAQ/HowTo structure, mobile readability, and accessibility.
description.zh: 检查内容清晰度、标题层级、列表、可点击 TOC、FAQ/HowTo 结构、移动端阅读和无障碍体验。

description.en: Checks semantic HTML, headings, internal and external links, link health, image alt text, metadata signals, and JSON-LD.
description.zh: 检查语义化 HTML、标题结构、内外链及连通性、图片 Alt、基础 SEO 标签和 JSON-LD。

description.en: Finds spelling, grammar, intent, completeness, unsupported claims, source gaps, and author-trust issues without inventing evidence.
description.zh: 检查拼写语法、搜索意图、内容完整度、无依据声明、来源缺口和作者信任信号，不凭空制造证据。

description.en: Combines the audit, change list, and storefront-style preview; writes only approved fields, then verifies the saved Article.
description.zh: 合并审计报告、修改清单和店铺样式预览；只推送批准字段，并在写入后复核 Article。
